/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/main.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/App.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/AudioAnalyzer.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/LIFToneSynth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/LIFNetwork.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/MidiRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/LayerManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/VideoDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/MetalCompositor.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/ControlWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/PressureControlWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/CapsLockDetector.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/PerformanceWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/MediaPickerWindow.mm.o CMakeFiles/vjay_ace.dir/src/app/FxPatch.cpp.o -o vjay_ace
